name: Italian Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp artificial sweetener equivalent to 1 tsp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the salad oil and wine vinegar.
2. Add the measured amounts of pepper, artificial sweetener (equal to 1 teaspoon), sugar, oregano, sweet basil, and garlic powder.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a jar with a tight-fitting lid and shake well to blend all components evenly.
